'''''Vader: The Ultimate Guide''''' is a one-shot souvenir magazine about [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. It features a great deal of photographs, original art, and various other content. It debuted at [[Wikipedia:Comic-Con International|Comic-Con International]] in July [[2005]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*'''Introduction'''
*"[[The Story of Anakin]]" by [[Daniel Wallace]] - Extensive biography of Anakin/Vader
**Including [[:File:VadersRemorse.jpg|"The Great Remorse of Vader"]] by [[Joe Corroney]]
*"[[The Path of Evil]]" by [[Abel G. Peña]] - Brief history of the Sith and timeline
*"[[Vader Tech]]" by Abel G. Peña - Vader's armor, the lightsabers he used, and his vehicles
*'''Bringing Vader to Life''' - How Vader's appearance was created through concept art and costume design. Also a paragraph on his breathing.
*"[[In His Image]]" by [[Karen Traviss]] - Short story: Vader finds [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] templates and fights an assassination attempt.
*'''The Men in Black''' - Interviews with [[James Earl Jones]] and [[Hayden Christensen]], biographies of [[David Prowse]], [[Jake Lloyd]], [[Bob Anderson]] and [[Sebastian Shaw]].
*'''Villain with a Thousand Faces: The History of Darth Vader Collectibles''' by [[Pete Vilmur]]
*'''Vader Trivia'''
